metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4727
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4: Confocal imaging of hippocampal neuronal cultures with co-staining for Homer1c-mCherry and Dyn2-GFP (DNM2) show this protein is localized at the postsynapse. Instead of GFP tagging, endogenous DNM2 was also tagged using CRISPR/Cas-9.

Figure 5: time-lapse experiments on neurons co-expressing Homer1c and fluorophore-tagged DNM2 showed high association with PSDs.

Figure 6: to dissect the spatial organization of endocytic proteins relative to the clathrin structure at
the endocytic zone (EZ), authors used two-color single-molecule localization microscopy (SMLM). Halo-CLCa co-transfected with GFP-tagged DNM2 showed that it was often distributed in smaller patches around and sometimes within the EZ marked by CLCa.. Experimental description: M&M: "Hippocampal cultures were prepared from brain of embryonic day 18 (E18) Wistar rats (both genders) as described before (Scheefhals et al., 2019)"

"The knock-in constructs for GFP-Eps15, GFP-Itsn1 and GFP-Dyn2 were designed and cloned as described previously (Willems et al., 2020)"

anti-Dyn2 (1:400, BD Biosciences Cat #610263, RRID:AB_397659)

checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
